title: Partial<T>
instruction:
`Partial<T>` makes all properties of T optional. Perfect for update/patch operations where you only send changed fields.

Run this.
successMessage: `Partial<Config>` allows passing any subset of Config properties. The spread merges base with overrides.

title: Pick and Omit
instruction:
`Pick<T, K>` selects specific properties; `Omit<T, K>` removes them. Both create new types from an existing one.

Run this.
successMessage: `Pick` and `Omit` are great for creating API response shapes and form input types from a single source-of-truth interface.

title: Record<K, V>
instruction:
`Record<K, V>` creates a type where all keys are of type K and all values are of type V. Cleaner than index signatures for known key sets.

Run this.
successMessage: `Record<Lang, LangInfo>` ensures every language key is present and every value has `icon` and `level`. Exhaustive and type-safe.

title: ReturnType and Parameters
instruction:
Extract the return type and parameter types from any function using `ReturnType` and `Parameters`.

Run this.
successMessage: `ReturnType` and `Parameters` let you derive types from existing functions — great for keeping types in sync without duplication.
